words.def: a state of steady vigorous action that is characteristic of an activity
words.zh: n. （複數）鞦韆；搖擺, 改變, 衝力（swing的複數形式）

words.def: a perceptible indication of something not immediately apparent (as a visible clue that something has happened)
a perceptible indication of something not immediately apparent (as a visible clue that something has happened)
words.zh: n. 符號, 招牌, 徵兆, 正負號, 手勢

words.def: a movable organ for flying (one of a pair)
words.zh: n. 翅膀, 翼, 機翼, 派別

words.def: a victory (as in a race or other competition)
words.zh: vt. 贏得, 打勝, 成功
